description_long: This is a rectangular desk with a smooth, light-colored surface and a modesty panel on one side. The desk features a single decorative drawer and a cabinet on the right, both with ornate handles and paneling, suggesting a classic or traditional design. The left side is open, providing legroom and easy access beneath the desk. The top surface is slightly contoured on the right edge, adding a subtle design element. The construction appears to be primarily wood or engineered wood, with a painted or laminated finish. The overall build is sturdy, suitable for writing, working, or using a computer.
description: A light-colored, classic-style desk with a drawer and cabinet on the right, smooth contoured top, and open left side for legroom.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the open left side and the modesty panel beneath the desk surface.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flat panel and the contoured front edge of the desk.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the decorative drawer and cabinet with handles on the right, and open space on the left.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side panel and the contoured front edge, with the cabinet and drawer just visible.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the drawer and cabinet, intended to be approached from the open left side for legroom and access to storage.
